changeSet.author: custom
changeSet.sql: IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE name = 'fk_user_id' AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID('jhi_user_authority')) ALTER TABLE jhi_user_authority DROP CONSTRAINT fk_user_id;
IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE name = 'fk_authority_name' AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID('jhi_user_authority')) ALTER TABLE jhi_user_authority DROP CONSTRAINT fk_authority_name;
IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE name = 'fk_permisos_modulo' AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID('permisos_perfil')) ALTER TABLE permisos_perfil DROP CONSTRAINT fk_permisos_modulo;
IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE name = 'fk_permisos_perfil' AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID('permisos_perfil')) ALTER TABLE permisos_perfil DROP CONSTRAINT fk_permisos_perfil;
IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE name = 'fk_modulo_menu' AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID('modulo')) ALTER TABLE modulo DROP CONSTRAINT fk_modulo_menu;
IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE name = 'fk_user_perfil' AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID('jhi_user')) ALTER TABLE jhi_user DROP CONSTRAINT fk_user_perfil;
IF OBJECT_ID('jhi_user_authority', 'U') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE jhi_user_authority;
IF OBJECT_ID('permisos_perfil', 'U') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE permisos_perfil;
IF OBJECT_ID('candidato', 'U') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE candidato;
IF OBJECT_ID('jhi_carousel_image', 'U') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE jhi_carousel_image;
IF OBJECT_ID('jhi_user', 'U') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE jhi_user;
IF OBJECT_ID('modulo', 'U') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE modulo;
IF OBJECT_ID('menu', 'U') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE menu;
IF OBJECT_ID('perfil', 'U') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE perfil;
IF OBJECT_ID('jhi_authority', 'U') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE jhi_authority;
IF OBJECT_ID('jhi_date_time_wrapper', 'U') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE jhi_date_time_wrapper;
IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.sequences WHERE name = 'sequence_generator') DROP SEQUENCE sequence_generator;
